slots.notes: Full-screen hero background. A dark, cybersecurity-themed background with a soft gradient. Native placeholder is an abstract security/network background; replace with brand-specific visual asset. Fills the entire page - full-width, full-vheight. No people, no text.
The brand logo at the top-left of the hero. About 48px. Native placeholder is a stylized circular shape or an abstract logo mark.
The primary CTA button - it reads something like 'Get Started' or 'Book a Demo.' Rounded button. Border-radius: 8px. Note: text-accent-color.
Heading, body, and subtext. Heading is large, font-bold, tracking-tight. Body is smaller, more contrast. Subtext is smallest. Supply dummy text - brand will replace.

mechanic: A full-page hero with dark bg, logo, headline, body, subtext, and CTA button. Left-text, right-image layout. Framer Motion useInView.
techDelivery: React 18 + TypeScript. Tailwind CSS 3. Framer Motion v12.
reskinNotes: Blank slate. Text is hardcoded dummy copy.
